name: morpheme_phon_demo
description: Morpheme-bag PHON: one block per unique morpheme. Train river+bay as nouns, run+goes as verbs. Probe held-out riverrun, whose morfessor decomposition is river+run. Predicted: bilateral routing (N/V ≈ 1) because the two morphemes carry equal-magnitude, opposite-sign supervision.
segmenter_note: All 4 segmenters (BPE-4k, Unigram-4k, Morfessor, FlatCat) agree on single-morpheme decomposition for river, bay, run, goes, and on riverrun = river + run. Morfessor chosen as default per its linguistic motivation (per scripts/preprocessing/README.md).

probe_words.expected_composition: river (N-trained) + run (V-trained), each morpheme trained for the same number of rounds
probe_words.prediction: N/V ratio near 1.0. With 4 segmenters agreeing on this decomposition, the result is independent of segmenter choice.
